channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran and Israel Exchange Strikes as Gulf Conflict Enters Third Week
item.description: The conflict between Iran and Israel has now entered its third week, with attacks continuing across the Gulf region. Iran has persisted in launching missiles and drones against Gulf Arab states, inclu...

item.description: Foreign Affairs Minister Anita Anand has clarified Canada's position regarding the potential involvement in the ongoing conflict between the U.S. and Israel against Iran. While the Canadian government...

item.title: Comprehensive review of the best juicers in the UK for 2026
item.description: The Independent’s detailed review of the ten best juicers in 2026 showcases a range of machines suited to different needs, budgets, and households. The article distinguishes between two main types of ...

item.title: Chuck Norris, legendary action star and martial artist, passes away at 86
item.description: Chuck Norris, the iconic American action star, passed away on Friday, March 20, 2026, at the age of 86. His family announced his death on his official social media pages, expressing gratitude for the ...

item.title: Perth rental affordability hits a record low as rents nearly double since 2020
item.description: Rental affordability in Western Australia has dropped to its lowest point on record, with the latest data showing Perth's median advertised rents have risen by 94 per cent since 2019. According to the...

item.title: Trump criticises NATO partners as US strengthens military presence amid Iran tensions
item.description: Tensions between the United States and Iran have escalated sharply, with US President Donald Trump delivering a series of combative remarks toward both Tehran and Washington’s NATO allies. Speaking at...

item.title: Understanding Nigeria's Economic Struggles: Poverty, Inequality, or Informality?
item.description: The article explores Nigeria's complex economic challenges, dissecting the true nature of its poverty, inequality, and informality issues. Tope Fasua argues that while poverty remains a persistent iss...

item.title: New law brings gig workers under ESIC health scheme but implementation faces design and capacity hurdles
item.description: A new provision under the Code on Social Security, 2020 brings gig and platform workers under the Employees’ State Insurance Scheme (ESIS), which can offer them medical care and cash benefits for sick...

item.title: Calgary-based CoolIT acquired by Ecolab for $4.75 billion amid AI-driven data centre growth
item.description: Calgary-based CoolIT Systems Inc., a leading supplier of liquid cooling technologies for data centres, has been sold to U.S.-based Ecolab Inc. for US$4.75 billion, marking one of the largest technolog...

item.title: Henry Wanyoike Challenges Eliud Kipchoge to a Race to Promote Teamwork and Support for Disabled Athletes

item.description: During the Smart Summit 2026 held in Nairobi, industry leaders, government officials, and innovators emphasised that the growth of digital health in Kenya depends on strong partnerships across sectors...

item.title: Charles Bennett and Gilles Brassard Receive Turing Award for Founding Quantum Information Theory
item.description: Charles Bennett and Gilles Brassard, pioneers in quantum information theory, have been awarded the ACM A.M. Turing Award, the highest honor in computer science. Their collaboration began in 1979 durin...

item.title: Tinder Launches New Features to Improve Online Dating Experience
item.description: Tinder, the world’s most popular dating app, is rolling out a series of new features aimed at revitalizing the online dating experience, particularly for Gen Z and women, amid declining engagement. CE...

item.title: Chuck Norris, Martial Arts Legend and Star of ‘Walker, Texas Ranger,’ Passes Away at 86

item.title: Nicobarese Tribal Leaders Meet Rahul Gandhi Over Great Nicobar Project Concerns
